# DANTREE TYPE_REGISTRY
**Version:** 2.1 | **Generated by:** Manus | **Date:** 2026-03-31
**Purpose:** Exact interface snapshots for Claude to reference before code generation.
**Rule:** Paste relevant sections into `[INTERFACE_SNAPSHOT]` and `[TYPE_REGISTRY_EXCERPT]` blocks in task packages.

---

## REFRESH RULE
Refresh this file after any task that:
- Adds or modifies fields in a READ-ONLY interface
- Adds new enum values to any type below
- Deprecates or renames a wrapper function
- Adds a new protocol version (e.g., 12.3 → 12.4)

---

## SECTION 1 — level11MultiAssetEngine.ts
**Source:** `server/level11MultiAssetEngine.ts`
**Role:** Level 11 multi-asset engine — READ-ONLY

```typescript
// ── ENUMS ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

export type AssetType =
  | "equity"
  | "commodity"
  | "index"
  | "etf_equity"
  | "etf_sector"
  | "etf_macro";

export type PrimaryDriverType =
  | "business"
  | "macro"
  | "liquidity"
  | "flow"
  | "hybrid";

export type SentimentPhase =
  | "skepticism"
  | "early_bull"
  | "consensus"
  | "overheat"
  | "fragile"
  | "capitulation";

// ── INTERFACES ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

export interface DriverSignal {
  driver: string;
  type: DriverType;
  strength: number;   // 0–1
  why: string;
  /** Observable signal that confirms or denies this driver is active */
  monitoring_signal: string;
  /** What would falsify this driver — specific observable condition */
  risk_if_wrong: string;
}

export interface RealDriversOutput {
  drivers: DriverSignal[];
  signal_vs_noise_summary: string;
  primary_real_driver: string;
  primary_narrative_driver: string;
  advisory_only: true;
}

export interface PropagationLink {
  from: string;        // ← CORRECT field name (NOT from_asset)
  to: string;          // ← CORRECT field name (NOT to_asset)
  mechanism: string;
  lag: string;
  confidence: number;  // 0–1  (NOT correlation_strength)
}

export interface PropagationChainOutput {
  event: string;
  chain: PropagationLink[];   // ← CORRECT field name (NOT links)
  terminal_impact: string;
  uncertainty_note: string;
  advisory_only: true;
}

export interface Level11AnalysisOutput {
  classification: AssetClassification;
  driver_route: DriverEngineRoute;
  real_drivers: RealDriversOutput;
  incentives: IncentiveAnalysisOutput;
  sentiment_state: SentimentStateOutput;
  scenario_map: ScenarioMapOutput;
  policy_reality?: PolicyRealityOutput;
  propagation_chain?: PropagationChainOutput;
  advisory_only: true;
}
```

> **CRITICAL NOTES for Claude:**
> - `PropagationLink.from` / `.to` (NOT `.from_asset` / `.to_asset`)
> - `PropagationLink.confidence` (NOT `.correlation_strength`)
> - `PropagationChainOutput.chain` (NOT `.links`)
> - `DriverSignal.strength` (NOT `.confidence`)
> - `DriverSignal.risk_if_wrong` (NOT `.invalidation_condition`)

## SECTION 2 — experienceLayer.ts
**Source:** `server/experienceLayer.ts`
**Role:** Level 10.3 experience layer — READ-ONLY

```typescript
export interface ExperienceLayerInsight {
  drift_interpretation: string;    // natural language string (NOT enum)
  confidence_evolution: string;    // natural language string (NOT enum)
  behavior_insights: string;
  risk_gradient: string;           // natural language string (NOT enum)
  full_insight: string;            // composed paragraph
  advisory_only: true;
}

export interface ExperienceLayerOutput {
  ticker: string;
  drift: DriftDetectionOutput;
  confidence_update: ConfidenceUpdateOutput;
  management_behavior: ManagementBehaviorOutput;
  market_behavior: MarketBehaviorOutput;
  gradient_risk: GradientRiskOutput;
  experience_insight: ExperienceLayerInsight;  // ← access via .experience_insight
  time_context: TimeContextRecord;
  advisory_only: true;
}
```

> **CRITICAL NOTES for Claude:**
> - `drift_interpretation`, `confidence_evolution`, `risk_gradient` are **natural language strings**, not enums
> - Access insight via `.experience_insight` (NOT `.insight` or `.experienceInsight`)
> - Keyword detection on these strings is a bridge workaround — see OI-L12-001

---

## SECTION 3 — level105PositionLayer.ts
**Source:** `server/level105PositionLayer.ts`
**Role:** Level 10.5 position layer — READ-ONLY

```typescript
export interface PositionLayerOutput {
  asymmetry: AsymmetryScoreOutput;
  sizing: PositionSizingOutput;
  no_bet_discipline: NoBetDisciplineOutput;
  advisory_only: true;
}
```

> **NOTE:** `PositionLayerOutput` does NOT have a `drivers` field.
> Access driver signals via `Level11AnalysisOutput.real_drivers.drivers`.

---

## SECTION 4 — deepResearchEngine.ts
**Source:** `server/deepResearchEngine.ts`
**Role:** Deep research core — READ-ONLY

```typescript
export interface DeepResearchContextMap {
  ticker: string;
  sector: string;
  investorThinking: InvestorThinkingOutput;
  regime: RegimeOutput;
  factorInteraction: FactorInteractionOutput;
  businessContext: BusinessContext;
  signalFusionScore: number;    // 0–1
  dataQualityScore: number;     // 0–1
  priceChangePercent?: number;
  // NOTE: level11Analysis is NOT in this map (it's a parameter of composeResearchNarrative)
}
```

> **CRITICAL NOTE for Claude:**
> - `level11Analysis` is a **parameter** of `composeResearchNarrative()`, NOT a field of `DeepResearchContextMap`
> - Do NOT assume `ctx.level11Analysis` exists in `runDeepResearch()` scope

---

## SECTION 5 — semantic_protocol.ts
**Source:** `server/semantic_protocol.ts`
**Role:** Level 12.1 protocol core — Claude-owned

```typescript
export type SemanticDirection = "positive" | "negative" | "mixed" | "neutral";

export type SemanticTimeframe = "intraday" | "short" | "mid" | "long" | "structural";

export type SemanticTaskType =
  | "asset_classification"
  | "driver_routing"
  | "real_driver_identification"
  | "incentive_analysis"
  | "policy_reality"
  | "sentiment_detection"
  | "cross_asset_propagation"
  | "scenario_reasoning"
  | "narrative_composition"
  | "position_integration"
  | "risk_assessment"
  | "opportunity_radar"
  | "cycle_analysis"
  | "hypothesis_validation";
// TOTAL: 14 values — use >= 14 in assertions (NOT === 14)

export type SemanticInsightNote = string;

export interface SemanticConfidence {
  score: number;           // 0–1
  trend: SemanticConfidenceTrend;
  fragility: number;       // 0–1
  source_quality: SemanticSourceQuality;
  anchored_on?: string;
}

export interface SemanticSignalObject {
  name: string;
  direction: SemanticDirection;
  intensity: number;       // 0–1
  persistence: SemanticPersistence;
  urgency: SemanticUrgency;
  driver_type: SemanticDriverType;
  monitor?: string;
}

export interface SemanticRiskObject {
  name: string;
  severity: number;        // 0–1
  timing: SemanticRiskTiming;
  containment: SemanticContainment;
  trigger: string;
  mitigation_path?: string;
}

export interface SemanticTransportPacket {
  protocol_version: "12.1";
  advisory_only: true;
  agent: string;
  task: SemanticTaskType;
  entity: string;
  timeframe: SemanticTimeframe;
  state: SemanticStateEnvelope;
  signals: SemanticSignalObject[];
  risks: SemanticRiskObject[];
  confidence: SemanticConfidence;
  constraints: SemanticInsightNote[];
  invalidations: SemanticInsightNote[];
  insight_notes: SemanticInsightNote[];
  // ... additional fields in full definition
}
```

---

## SECTION 6 — semantic_aggregator.ts
**Source:** `server/semantic_aggregator.ts`
**Role:** Level 12.2 aggregation layer — Claude-owned

```typescript
export interface UnifiedSemanticState {
  protocol_version: "12.2";
  entity: string;
  timeframe: SemanticTimeframe;
  dominant_direction: SemanticDirection | "unclear";
  state_summary: AggregatedStateSummary;
  signals: SemanticSignalObject[];
  risks: SemanticRiskObject[];
  confidence: AggregatedConfidence;
  conflicts: SemanticConflict[];
  invalidations: SemanticInsightNote[];
  semantic_notes: SemanticInsightNote[];
  source_agents: string[];
  packet_count: number;
  advisory_only: true;
}

export interface SynthesisSemanticEnvelope {
  protocol_version: "12.2";
  entity: string;
  dominant_direction: SemanticDirection | "unclear";
  confidence_score: number;
  confidence_fragility: number;
  confidence_downgraded: boolean;
  top_signals: SemanticSignalObject[];      // top 3
  top_risks: SemanticRiskObject[];          // top 3
  has_conflicts: boolean;
  conflict_count: number;
  unresolved_conflicts: SemanticConflict[];
  key_invalidations: SemanticInsightNote[]; // top 5
  semantic_notes: SemanticInsightNote[];    // top 8
  state_regime?: string;
  state_crowding?: number;
  state_fragility?: number;
  advisory_only: true;
}
```

| Wrong (Claude guessed) | Correct (actual field) | Source |
|---|---|---|
| `PropagationLink.from_asset` | `PropagationLink.from` | level11MultiAssetEngine.ts:1092 |
| `PropagationLink.to_asset` | `PropagationLink.to` | level11MultiAssetEngine.ts:1092 |
| `PropagationLink.correlation_strength` | `PropagationLink.confidence` | level11MultiAssetEngine.ts:1092 |
| `PropagationChainOutput.links` | `PropagationChainOutput.chain` | level11MultiAssetEngine.ts:1100 |
| `DriverSignal.confidence` | `DriverSignal.strength` | level11MultiAssetEngine.ts:274 |
| `DriverSignal.invalidation_condition` | `DriverSignal.risk_if_wrong` | level11MultiAssetEngine.ts:274 |
| `ExperienceLayerOutput.insight` | `ExperienceLayerOutput.experience_insight` | experienceLayer.ts:854 |
| `ctx.level11Analysis` | parameter of `composeResearchNarrative()` | deepResearchEngine.ts |
